query: Draft a cold call script for an HR Director at logistics companies. We have no client case studies or proven proof points yet for this sector.
expected_behavior: Chooses the referral or problem-first opener pattern based on context
Under Section 5 (Mini Proof), applies the default 'reasons people reach out' generalization without fabricating metrics
Avoids any em dashes in the script body
Capping the call next step invitation at 15 minutes
